sn47.14:1.0.1: On one occasion the Blessed One was dwelling among the Vajjians at Ukkacela on the bank of the river Ganges, together with a great Bhikkhu Saṅgha, not long after Sāriputta and Moggallana had attained final Nibbāna.Now on that occasion the Blessed One was sitting in the open air in the midst of the Bhikkhu Saṅgha.
sn47.14:1.0.2: Then the Blessed One, having surveyed the silent Bhikkhu Saṅgha, addressed the bhikkhus thus:sn.v.164
sn47.14:1.0.3: "Therefore, bhikkhus, dwell with yourselves as your own island, with yourselves as your own refuge, with no other refuge; dwell with the Dhamma as your island, with the Dhamma as your refuge, with no other refuge …as in §9…sn.v.165
